All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

U

UNKNOWN - Enum constant in enum class user.UserType
Default user type, also used for logIn
UNREGISTERED_CLIENT - Enum constant in enum class user.UserType
Unregistered client
UnregisteredClient - Class in user
It implements the unregistered client
UnregisteredClient(boolean) - Constructor for class user.UnregisteredClient
Creates a new unregistered client
UnregisteredClientLoop - Class in main
The type Unregistered client loop.
User - Class in user
It defines the user of the app
User() - Constructor for class user.User
Creates a new user without id, password or username
User(UserType, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class user.User
Creates a new user, but for other classes
User(UserType, String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class user.User
Creates a new user
UserType - Enum Class in user
It defines the user types
utilities - package utilities
This package contains several utilities that are useful in the store.
Utility - Class in utilities
It implements elements such a sign in method and login method which don't belong to either classes
Utility() - Constructor for class utilities.Utility
Creates a new utility
